site.title: WallyLog
site.description:
I work as a developer in Japan.
I mainly use the languages and frameworks listed below, and I am very interested in them.
This website is built with Next.js 😀

englishPattern.title: English Patterns
englishPattern.description: Learn patterns and test your skills with quizzes

statistics.amazingMessage: Your skills have greatly improved through consistent learning!
statistics.excellentMessage: Keep up this pace and your skills will grow even more!
statistics.goodMessage: Practice a little every day and you'll improve quickly!

quizSection.needsReview: Let's practice a bit more to form long-term memory! 📖

wonderWeeks.title: Wonder Weeks
wonderWeeks.allDone: All growth stages complete! Great job!
wonderWeeks.enterBirthDate: Please enter your baby's due date
wonderWeeks.about: A theory by Dutch researchers Frans Plooij & Hetty van de Rijt describing predictable periods of rapid brain growth. During these periods, babies tend to cry more, become fussier, and sleep less than usual.
wonderWeeks.aboutDateNote: Why dates may differ by 2–3 days: Wonder Weeks occur as intervals, not on a single exact day. Apps vary depending on whether they use the start of a week or the fussiness peak as their reference point. A 2–3 day difference is completely normal.
wonderWeeks.disclaimer: Wonder Weeks is a reference guide. Development varies between babies. Consult a pediatrician for health concerns.

babyGrowth.title: Baby Growth Guide
babyGrowth.disclaimer: Baby development varies greatly among individuals. The information below represents average trends. Also, as this information is AI-generated, please use it for reference only and consult a professional for specific health concerns.

subscription.title: Email Subscription
subscription.description:
When you submit the form, an admin will review it and register it as a GitHub Issue.
It will remain pending approval.
Once approved, emails will be sent automatically every morning at 9am.
subscription.sameEmailNotice: ※ The same email cannot be registered consecutively

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.noItems: Please select at least one subscription item.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.server: An error occurred while processing the subscription request.

messages.success: Your subscription request has been received. Please wait for admin approval.

trivia.title: Trivia Quiz
trivia.description: Learn fun facts and test your knowledge with a quiz

help.heading: 🎯 What is Vibe Coding Test?
help.items:
• Find the incorrect explanation among 4 descriptions for AI-generated code
• You can choose difficulty and programming language
• Solve quizzes in Korean, English, or Japanese
• Test your code reading skills and programming knowledge!
